name: A American Debt Consolidation
description_short: American Credit is a Los Angeles-based credit repair company that disputes negative items on credit reports and offers credit restoration services with a focus on rapid score improvement.
description_long:
American Credit has operated in the Los Angeles market for over 14 years, positioning itself as a credit restoration specialist serving the local community. The company's core business centers on disputing inaccurate or unfavorable items with credit bureaus and creditors to improve clients' credit profiles. Their approach involves case-by-case analysis by trained credit analysts who develop customized strategies rather than applying one-size-fits-all solutions.

The company offers credit repair consultation, fair credit reporting services, credit score raising programs, and debt consolidation support. They provide ongoing customer service and communication throughout the repair process, with a stated availability of 24/7 support. According to their website, they claim average client score increases of 70 to 100+ points within 2 to 4 months. They also advertise a 100% satisfaction guarantee with full refund of fees if clients are not satisfied.

American Credit distinguishes itself through selective client intake, stating they carefully choose clients they believe they can deliver results for. Their messaging emphasizes treating clients as individuals rather than credit scores, and they position credit repair as enabling access to major financial products (home loans, credit cards, rental leases). The company provides free initial consultations and credit analysis to prospective clients.

While the website makes strong performance claims, there are important caveats: credit repair timelines and results depend heavily on case-specific factors, dispute outcomes are not guaranteed despite their satisfaction guarantee, and the industry itself operates in a heavily regulated space. No independent third-party verification of their claimed average score increases or success rates is provided on the website.
pros: 14+ years operating in Los Angeles market with established local presence
Free no-obligation credit consultation and comprehensive analysis
Case-by-case customized strategy rather than templated approach
24/7 customer service availability with continuous progress updates
100% satisfaction guarantee with full refund policy if unsatisfied
Claimed average score improvements of 70-100+ points in 2-4 months
Specific service offerings for common credit barriers (home loans, rentals, employment, business credit)
cons: No independent verification of claimed score improvement results on website
Vague pricing structure—no clear fee information despite asking 'How Much Does It Cost'
Satisfaction guarantee and refund policy lack specific terms and conditions on website
High-claim language ('miraculous,' 'ALL derogatory items removed') raises credibility concerns
No disclosed details on dispute methodology, success rates, or typical timelines
best_for: Los Angeles residents with negative credit items (late payments, collections, charge-offs) seeking dispute assistance
Consumers denied mortgages, credit cards, or rental leases specifically due to credit report inaccuracies
Individuals willing to pay for professional credit repair who prefer local, established companies with long track records
diagnosis: American Credit is appropriate for Los Angeles-area consumers who have documented inaccuracies or outdated negative items on their credit reports and are willing to pay for professional dispute services. The primary caveat is that while they claim strong results, there is no third-party verification on their website, and credit repair outcomes depend heavily on whether items are actually disputable under Fair Credit Reporting Act standards—not all negative items can be successfully removed.
services: Credit report dispute and fair credit reporting
Ongoing credit bureau and creditor contact
Free initial credit analysis and situation assessment
